overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek walking through ancient Egyptian desert ruins. The video features a time-lapse transition from night through dawn to morning golden hour, moving from a campsite through a canyon with monumental statues to a wide valley overlook.

events.description: sky transitions from purple night to pink dawn colors
leaving campsite behind approaching canyon entrance

agents.ego_description: Bayek walking away from a campsite through desert terrain at dawn

entered.detail: red cloth and bedding on the ground with candles
small fire with candles illuminating the campsite
stone walls and structures of ancient ruins ahead
bright full moon visible in the purple night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a desert campsite with bedding and fire on the right, under a purple night sky with a visible moon. Bayek walks forward through sandy terrain toward ancient ruins as the sky transitions to pink dawn colors, leaving the campsite behind.

events.description: entering narrow canyon between high rock walls
slight turn right to approach large pharaoh statues

agents.ego_description: walking through canyon toward ancient pharaoh statues carved into the walls

entered.detail: large ancient Egyptian pharaoh statue carved from stone
tall red rock canyon walls enclosing the path
ancient stone gateway structure between the statues

segments.scene_description: Entering a narrow canyon passage with high rock walls, the scene focuses on approaching large pharaoh statues. The lighting shifts to golden hour with the sun rising behind the rocks, illuminating the stone structures ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone gateway with dust effects

events.description: dust kicks up around feet when passing through the stone gate
rock faces turn bright red-orange as direct sunrise light hits them

agents.ego_description: passing between large stone statues through the ancient gateway

entered.detail: leafless dead tree silhouetted against the sky
dust particles kicked up from the sandy ground

segments.scene_description: Walking through the ancient stone gateway between the pharaoh statues, dust kicks up from the ground. The canyon walls close in on the left while a dead tree appears ahead in the distance, with rocks glowing red-orange in the direct sunrise light.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert valley overlook with distant settlement

events.description: exiting narrow canyon into wide open valley view
game objective markers appear as white glowing particles in the air

agents.ego_description: walking along cliff edge overlooking vast desert valley and mountains

entered.detail: ancient settlement ruins visible in the valley below
large mountain peaks surrounding the desert valley

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the canyon into a wide-open valley overlook, the view expands to show a vast desert landscape with an ancient settlement in the valley below and mountain peaks in the distance. The dead tree passes by on the right as the path continues along the cliff edge under bright morning sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desert landscape that transforms from a moonlit night into a brilliant golden sunrise. It begins at a campsite with bedding and a fire under a purple night sky, moving forward across sandy terrain as the horizon shifts into the pink hues of dawn. As the camera enters a narrow canyon passage, the lighting transitions to a warm golden hour with the sun rising behind high rock walls to illuminate towering pharaoh statues. The scene then pushes through the ancient stone gateway between these statues, kicking up dust from the ground while the surrounding rocks glow red-orange in the direct morning light before revealing a lone dead tree in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as it emerges from a narrow canyon into a vast, sun-drenched desert valley. It begins by breaking through the canyon walls, where the view rapidly expands to reveal a wide-open overlook overlooking an ancient settlement nestled in the valley below. As the camera advances along the cliff edge, the landscape opens further to showcase distant mountain peaks under the brilliance of the morning sun. The scene then glides past a solitary dead tree on the right before continuing its trajectory across the high ridge toward the expansive horizon.
